description_long: This is a modern rectangular sink unit with a glossy, black-and-white striped cabinet and a smooth, curved white basin. The front of the cabinet features bold horizontal stripes and a central vertical accent, giving it a striking, contemporary appearance. The basin is integrated into the top of the cabinet and includes a single-hole faucet mounted at the rear, with a visible drain at the center of the basin. The sides of the unit are solid black, contrasting with the patterned front and rear. The faucet is metallic and has a single lever for water control. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban public restrooms or commercial spaces.
description: A modern, striped sink unit with a curved white basin, black-and-white cabinet, and a single metallic faucet. The design is bold and contemporary, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped cabinet, curved basin, and faucet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid black side panel and the basin's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cabinet and the faucet stem.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the faucet and the basin's profile.
